safety_escort.description: Free Walking Safety Escort by trained Student Patrol officers.

uic_safe_app: Free personal security app with emergency guidelines, dispatcher contact, route sharing, virtual escort.
uic_alert: University emergency notification system via email and optional text/call. Powered by Rave.
blue_phones: Emergency blue light call boxes across campus connect directly to UIC Police.

student_conduct.ai_use_policy: Unauthorized AI use counts as cheating. Whether AI is allowed depends on instructor/course rules.
student_conduct.sanctions: Warning through suspension, dismissal, or expulsion depending on severity.
student_conduct.appeal_window: 5 days to submit appeal after decision.

academic_integrity.how_to_report: Academic Integrity Incident Report through Community Standards / Dean of Students.

ferpa.parent_access: Parents generally cannot access records without student written consent.
ferpa.suppress_directory: Students can suppress directory information by filing a suppression request.

bias_reporting.description: Submit via Bias Reporting Tool. Anonymous submissions allowed.

it_security.netid: Used for Blackboard, email, myUIC, WiFi, computer labs.
it_security.mfa: Duo two-factor authentication required for VPN and some services.
it_security.vpn: Cisco AnyConnect. Required for off-campus access to some UIC resources.
